parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>20. <BIBL><TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE> noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, √† <PRICE>12. Gulden</PRICE></BIBL>, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL><TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>, zu vertauschen.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: The XML tag <PRIZE> was changed to <PRICE> as 'PRIZE' is not a standard XML tag and 'PRICE' seems more appropriate in this context.
